    • Data types
    • Vector Algebra
    • Oriented Drill Cores
    • Plotting
    • Orientation Plots
    • Orientation Plots with ggplot
    • Statistics
    • Statistics on the Sphere
    • Regression on the Sphere

    • Faults and Paleostress
    • Fault Offsets
    • Mohr Circle
    • Other
    • Strain and Vorticity Analysis
    • Deformation and Velocity Gradient Tensor

Sorting StraboSpot Projects

Source: R/import.R
sort_by.strabo.Rd

Sorts strabo objects in the order determined by one or more other objects, typically columns in the data data.frame. This will also sort the planar and linear objects.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'strabo'
sort_by(x, y, ...)

Arguments

x

object of class "strabo"

y

Variables to sort by. Typically a column in x$data data.frame. To sort by more than one column, take the form list(g1, g2, ...).

...

Additional arguments, typically passed on to order().

Value

A sorted version of x.

Examples

sort_by(strabo_prj, strabo_prj$data$dip_direction)
#> $data
#>                                        id dip_direction   dip strike trend
#>                                    <char>         <num> <num>  <num> <num>
#>   1: 8eafa098-d0f9-4f5a-bea1-32ecacfdf67e             0    42    270    83
#>   2: 201a5d08-a890-454d-8132-f795dc9e78c5             0    61    270   312
#>   3: 5db25631-768a-4dbc-991c-ecf14e24d938             2    41    272    79
#>   4: 79276f3e-87eb-4aae-807a-d188c5fd5b98             2    39    272    71
#>   5: 66c1d7bf-3f4d-4e2b-959b-174abbcbcc8a             3    81    273    92
#>  ---                                                                      
#> 319: e0500801-9bfc-487f-8cb3-5b4d536c7cb3           354    30    264    69
#> 320: e3695949-91f3-469c-9a88-5398b8687208           356    88    266   266
#> 321: d3777676-2f40-49d3-822f-ea188ba5f1ab           357    36    267    71
#> 322: 22d34b8d-9b19-4aa7-be0b-dbcec3244ac5           358    83    268    87
#> 323: e0c76bf2-823d-475d-afda-65aa8435407f           358    87    268   269
#>      plunge associated planar_type quality unix_timestamp  notes
#>       <num>     <lgcl>      <char>  <char>          <num> <char>
#>   1:      6       TRUE        <NA>    <NA>   1.692891e+12   <NA>
#>   2:     50       TRUE        <NA>       5   1.693082e+12   <NA>
#>   3:     11       TRUE        <NA>    <NA>   1.692891e+12   <NA>
#>   4:     16       TRUE        <NA>    <NA>   1.692897e+12   <NA>
#>   5:      4       TRUE        <NA>       5   1.687873e+12   <NA>
#>  ---                                                            
#> 319:      8       TRUE        <NA>    <NA>   1.692897e+12   <NA>
#> 320:      0       TRUE        <NA>    <NA>   1.687792e+12   <NA>
#> 321:     11       TRUE        <NA>    <NA>   1.692893e+12   <NA>
#> 322:     10       TRUE        <NA>    <NA>   1.692645e+12   <NA>
#> 323:     14       TRUE        <NA>    <NA>   1.692645e+12   <NA>
#>      modified_timestamp           spot        spot_id feature_type
#>                   <num>         <char>         <char>       <char>
#>   1:                 NA 23-TS-Moss-139 16928905110927    foliation
#>   2:                 NA 23-TS-Moss-170 16930814935740    foliation
#>   3:                 NA 23-TS-Moss-139 16928905110927    foliation
#>   4:                 NA 23-TS-Moss-141 16928973747488    foliation
#>   5:                 NA  23-TS-Moss-51 16878724705561    foliation
#>  ---                                                              
#> 319:                 NA 23-TS-Moss-141 16928973747488    foliation
#> 320:                 NA  23-TS-Moss-40 16877910624414    foliation
#> 321:                 NA 23-TS-Moss-140 16928926111747    foliation
#> 322:                 NA 23-TS-Moss-107 16926438777524    foliation
#> 323:                 NA 23-TS-Moss-107 16926438777524    foliation
#>       foliation_type  label contact_type fault_or_sz_type bedding_type
#>               <char> <char>       <char>           <char>       <char>
#>   1:            <NA>   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>   2:     schistosity   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>   3:            <NA>   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>   4:            <NA>   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>   5:     schistosity   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>  ---                                                                  
#> 319:            <NA>   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#> 320:        cleavage   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#> 321:            <NA>   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#> 322: slatey_cleavage   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#> 323: slatey_cleavage   <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>      vein_fill directional_indicators vein_type other_vein_fill
#>         <char>                 <char>    <char>          <char>
#>   1:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>   2:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>   3:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>   4:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>   5:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>  ---                                                           
#> 319:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#> 320:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#> 321:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#> 322:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#> 323:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>      foliation_defined_by movement other_feature fracture_type
#>                    <char>   <char>        <char>        <char>
#>   1:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>   2:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>   3:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>   4:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>   5:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>  ---                                                          
#> 319:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#> 320:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#> 321:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#> 322:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#> 323:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>      movement_justification        linear_type linear_quality linear_notes
#>                      <char>             <char>         <char>       <char>
#>   1:                   <NA> linear_orientation           <NA>         <NA>
#>   2:                   <NA> linear_orientation              5         <NA>
#>   3:                   <NA> linear_orientation           <NA>         <NA>
#>   4:                   <NA> linear_orientation           <NA>         <NA>
#>   5:                   <NA> linear_orientation              5         <NA>
#>  ---                                                                      
#> 319:                   <NA> linear_orientation           <NA>         <NA>
#> 320:                   <NA> linear_orientation           <NA>         <NA>
#> 321:                   <NA> linear_orientation           <NA>         <NA>
#> 322:                   <NA> linear_orientation           <NA>         <NA>
#> 323:                   <NA> linear_orientation           <NA>         <NA>
#>      linear_feature_type linear_defined_by linear_label               type
#>                   <char>            <char>       <char>             <char>
#>   1:          stretching              <NA>         <NA> planar_orientation
#>   2:          stretching               Hbl         <NA> planar_orientation
#>   3:          stretching              <NA>         <NA> planar_orientation
#>   4:          stretching              <NA>         <NA> planar_orientation
#>   5:          stretching               Hbl         <NA> planar_orientation
#>  ---                                                                      
#> 319:          stretching              <NA>         <NA> planar_orientation
#> 320:          stretching              <NA>         <NA> planar_orientation
#> 321:          stretching              <NA>         <NA> planar_orientation
#> 322:          stretching              <NA>         <NA> planar_orientation
#> 323:          stretching              <NA>         <NA> planar_orientation
#>      linear_unix_timestamp                            linear_id defined_by
#>                      <num>                               <char>     <char>
#>   1:          1.692891e+12 045ad2b9-5a85-4228-8273-55484b2ec6ce       <NA>
#>   2:          1.693082e+12 94bc8ef4-a758-4722-8ce5-236ba24ff444       <NA>
#>   3:          1.692891e+12 52e54e60-237e-4c9a-8873-9859cc445f97       <NA>
#>   4:          1.692897e+12 73357466-3526-4475-877a-4af76afcc696       <NA>
#>   5:          1.687873e+12 ff1ba044-0409-4db5-98bb-664a6604bac7       <NA>
#>  ---                                                                      
#> 319:          1.692897e+12 1df00205-dbda-4c79-b58a-c0db48e32abf       <NA>
#> 320:          1.687792e+12 4fec1a8e-a8f2-4a3f-9e8f-a1bd32179098       <NA>
#> 321:          1.692893e+12 b3203ffb-bab9-446a-9a8c-cff9dd003123       <NA>
#> 322:          1.692645e+12 52a946c8-6044-47d1-95c8-843f4e86b57d       <NA>
#> 323:          1.692645e+12 8c7944cc-10fe-4c11-ae01-4b31554e3d39       <NA>

#>                    <char>
#>   1:                 <NA>
#>   2:                 <NA>

#>   4:                 <NA>
#>   5:                 <NA>
#>  ---

#> $linear
#> Line object (n = 323):
#>        azimuth plunge
#>   [1,]      83      6
#>   [2,]     312     50
